parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'accepted', tts_text: 'Quality Alert empfangen.', source: 'n8n', correlation_id: $json.body?.correlation_id || $json.correlation_id }) }}

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ correlation_id: $json.correlation_id, alert_id: $json.alert_id, schema_version: $json.schema_version, execution_id: [$workflow.id, $execution.id].filter(Boolean).join('-') || null, latency_tracking: $json.latency_tracking, ai_disposition: $json.ai_disposition, ai_confidence: $json.ai_confidence, ai_summary: $json.ai_summary, ai_enhanced_description: $json.ai_enhanced_description, ai_photo_analysis: $json.ai_photo_analysis, ai_recommended_action: $json.ai_recommended_action, ai_provider: $json.ai_provider, ai_model: $json.ai_model }) }}
